register.note: Full-width before/after diptych reads as a poster and thumbnail-legible (contort vs smooth); held to 3 by the left curve's fling-off near the panel edges.
Mechanism (same degree-12 model contorting vs obeying the penalty, train/test filled/hollow, per-panel test error) is in the picture.
See plot self-labels (mono title, axes, error-vs-lambda inset with best-lambda line + legend, two-scores readout).
Warm cream ground, soft borders, smooth anti-aliased curve, clean hierarchy; slack empty space lower-left of the see prose.
Explanatory lambda slider with live readout drives the persistent curve plus one load ease — clears the floor.
prediction-blue curve, truth-amber points, error-red numbers, control-purple slider+coefficient bars; no red-field dilution.

hero.note: Before/after on the same degree-12 model: lambda~0 overfit (test 0.43) vs lambda=0.3 smooth (0.11); to reach 4, contain the left fling-off and label train/test split.

assessment.note: Check has a docked live lambda slider + error-vs-lambda chart and an open closing transfer prompt.

verdict.summary: Clears register 3 across all six dimensions including both DELIGHT floors.
